_disclaimer: SAMPLE DATA ONLY — contains INTENTIONAL compliance violations for testing the BCI Security compliance scanner. This file demonstrates what the scanner catches. None of the PII in this file is real.
_purpose: Test fixture for /bci compliance --demo and /bci-scan --demo. Exercises PII detection (Rules PII-004, PII-005, PII-006, PII-010, PII-011, PII-013, PII-014, PII-015, PII-017, PII-018), all 3 transport security rules, and regulatory compliance mapping across GDPR, CCPA, Chile Neurorights, UNESCO, and Mind Act.

study.name: ADHD Resting-State EEG Study
study.dataset_source: Based on Mendeley ADHD resting-state EEG dataset structure (79 subjects, 37 ADHD + 42 controls)

subjects._violation_PII004: Filenames contain subject names — triggers PII-004
subjects._violation_PII005: Subject name in EDF header — triggers PII-005
subjects._violation_PII006: Date of birth in metadata — triggers PII-006

neural_processing._violation_PII013: Clinical diagnosis in metadata — triggers PII-013

data_handling._violation_PII014: No .consent.json sidecar files exist — triggers PII-014
data_handling._violation_PII015: General purpose use with no purpose limitation — triggers PII-015
data_handling.purpose: general_purpose neural data research — any use permitted
data_handling._violation_retention: No retention policy — data kept indefinitely
data_handling.retention_policy: indefinite — retain forever for future research

stimulation._violation_PII018: Neurostimulation without safety bounds — triggers PII-018
stimulation._note: No max current limit, no session duration limit, no cumulative dose tracking, no emergency shutoff documented

security_issues._transport: LSL with no encryption — triggers Rule 1
security_issues._storage: EDF files with PII in headers and filenames — triggers Rule 2
security_issues._api: Cloud transfer over HTTP — triggers Rule 3 if api_endpoint is HTTP

applicable_techniques: QIF-T0045 — Neural data interception (LSL no encryption)
